drivetrain.reasoning: R1: Swerve mandatory. Balanced speed for grid alignment precision. MK4i L2 for reliability.

intake.game_piece: CONE (12.5" tall, 0.55 lb) + CUBE (9.5" inflated, 0.8 lb)
intake.reasoning: R5: Dual game piece — compliant wheels grip both cone rubber and cube foam. Over-bumper intake pivots to reach ground. Must handle 2 shapes.

scorer.reasoning: R4+R6: Grid has 3 rows — bottom (floor), mid (27.5"), high (46"). Two-stage elevator to reach high row. Wrist for cone orientation (upright vs inverted). R19: Grid scoring is UNCAPPED per slot but grid has 27 slots shared by alliance. High row = 5 pts. Links (3 in a row) provide Ranking Point.

endgame.reasoning: R8: Charge station balance — drive-only endgame, no climb mechanism needed. Just drive onto tilting platform and auto-balance. R19: Charge Station RP requires all 3 robots engaged (docked/engaged). 10 pts for engaged. Worth it via driving, not a mechanism.

autonomous.reasoning: R7: Auto mobility 3 pts + charge station engage 12 pts. Score preload on high row (6 pts auto) then engage. R18: 1-piece + engage is the reliable auto.

scoring_analysis.primary_method: High row grid scoring (5 pts, SEMI-CAPPED at 9 slots)
scoring_analysis.reasoning: R19: Grid is SEMI-CAPPED (27 total slots) but most matches don't fill it. High row dominates. Link RP at 5 links = 15 high-row pieces. Elevator + wrist to reach all rows is the architecture.
